detail:
Fault You are not allowed to create 'Contact' (res.partner) records.

This operation is allowed for the following groups:
	- Contact/Creation
	- Purchase/Administrator
	- Recruitment/Officer: Manage all applicants
	- Sales/Administrator
	- Administrative Responsible
	- HR
	- HR Responsible
	- IT Person
	- Marketing Manager
	- Operation
	- Operation On Boarder
	- Quality Manager
	- Sales(cold)
	- Sales Cold Team Director
	- Sales Cold Team Manager
	- Sales(Hot)
	- Sales Manager
	- Show Sales
	- Team Director
	- Team Manager
	- VPs

Contact your administrator to request access if necessary.

<Fault 4: "You are not allowed to access 'Lead' (crm.lead) records.

This operation is allowed for the following groups:
	- Consultant/Developer/Consultant
	- Consultant/Developer/Developer
	- Sales/Administrator
	- Administrative Responsible
	- Can access data in read only mode
	- Can access opportunities in Read-only mode
	- CFO
	- CFO For His Company
	- Community Manager
	- Customer Referencer
	- Email Manager
	- Infographiste
	- Management Control
	- Marketing Manager
	- Operation
	- Operation On Boarder
	- Quality Manager
	- Sales(cold)
	- Sales Cold Team Director
	- Sales Cold Team Manager
	- Sales(Hot)
	- Show Sales
	- Team Director
	- Team Manager
	- VPs
	- Webmaster
	- Role / Portal

Contact your administrator to request access if necessary.">
